title: tristemon palustris
intro: Tristemon palustris, also known as Swamp St. John's Wort, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its yellow flowers and hairy leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from skin conditions like eczema and acne. Swamp St. John's Wort can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies.
